name: Box
description: Search, read, and access files stored in Box cloud storage through AI chat.
setup_notes:
Requires Box JWT credentials for persistent server-to-server authentication.

Admin setup (JWT - recommended for org-level access):
1. Go to https://app.box.com/developers/console and create a new Custom App
2. Select 'Server Authentication (with JWT)' as the authentication method
3. Under Configuration > Add and Manage Public Keys, click 'Generate a Public/Private Keypair'
4. Download the JSON config file that is generated
5. Base64-encode the JSON config: base64 -i your_config.json (macOS) or base64 your_config.json (Linux)
6. Copy the base64 string and your Box User ID
7. In your Box Admin Console, authorize the application
8. Enter the base64-encoded JWT config and User ID in the server configuration

Alternative: For quick testing, you can use a Developer Token instead (set BOX_DEV_TOKEN). Developer tokens expire after 60 minutes and are not suitable for production use.

Note: Requires Node.js 22 or higher.
